prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) model. Daily drift and volatility were estimated from historical data (assuming an annualized drift of ~22% and volatility of ~28%, reflecting ORCL's recent strong performance and typical market fluctuations). 10,000 simulations were run for 20 trading days. The point estimate is the median of the simulated prices, and the confidence intervals are derived from the corresponding percentiles of the simulated distribution.
